news.t: Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
Hong Kong plans tax cuts on bonus pay to lure top fund managers, sources say
Hong Kong watchdog raids local units of two Chinese brokerages, sources say
Hong Kong overtakes Switzerland as world's top cross-border wealth hub on China ties, report shows
Foreign firms eye Hong Kong listings as IPO rebound broadens

holdings.infoBox: EWH is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are AIA Group stock at 20.92%, Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing at 14.32%, CK Hutchison Holdings at 6.21%, BOC Hong Kong (Holdings) at 4.96%, and Techtronic Industries Company at 4.86%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Hong Kong ETF (EWH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Hong Kong 25/50 index, a modified market-cap-weighted index of firms listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. EWH was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.
